title: Cuneiform Tablet #0165: Early Dynastic Mathematical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Mathematical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records mathematical matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
